notes: Open Shopify store (private-label Primo brand + reseller of Crosstex/PDI/Halyard/3M/BeeSure/Medicom/Cranberry/Tribest lines). Config-driven Shopify routing (adapters/shopify-config.ts): matched by origin host primodentalproducts.com OR distributor alias, then extracted via the shared /products.json catalog path (shopify-catalog-extraction.ts) with the per-page HTML adapter (adapters/shopify.ts) as the fallback tier. variant.sku -> supplier SKU, product.vendor -> brand, variant.price (dollars string) -> price, variant.available -> stock. Small but complete catalog: 199 products in a single page (/products.json?limit=250&page=1; page 2 empty), 22 distinct brands. Shopify strips variant.barcode from the public list /products.json, so expect no GTIN/UPC (no lot/expiry barcode hook) and no unit_of_measure, same limitation as our other Shopify-sourced suppliers. No bot protection observed (plain UA gets 200 JSON). Net32 winning seller ("Primo Dental"). Verified live 2026-07-01 (read-only): products.json 200 with 199 products; Primo Powder Free Nitrile Gloves (sku 101-NG100XS, brand Primo) = $12.49; 0/199 products carried a variant.barcode; not present in medmkp_supplier (direct-supplier set) nor in any other data/supplier-vetting/*.json.
